limits: free-text instructions are not reliably executed end-to-end
chat flow is mainly support-oriented, not autonomous action-oriented
limited cross-system orchestration from chatbot layer
opportunity_for_suki: upgrade from support chatbot to action agent using canonical Intent->Action->Adapter flow
execute real operations from chat with mandatory confirmation + audit
provide multichannel operation (WhatsApp/Telegram/web) with same core logic
enable tenant-level sandbox/production switching and connector governance

must_have_capabilities: strict state transition control (anti-loop + transactional confirmation)
canonical adapter architecture for external APIs
registry-driven help and real capability disclosure
multitenant action isolation + audit by default
